name: Query Clarity
summary: Rates a user query's clarity, specificity, and coherence on a 5-point Likert scale (very poor → excellent), with a matching label and reasoning.
description: An LLM-as-a-Judge that scores the quality of a user query — not the response — on its clarity, specificity, and coherence, using a 5-point Likert scale from very poor to excellent. It returns an integer score (1–5), the corresponding rating label, and a short reasoning highlighting the query's strengths and weaknesses. Adapted from the Magpie query-quality judge (Xu et al., 2024, arXiv:2406.08464).
